feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom document type not available in filter in app, Manage Purchase Order.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created document types for PO in Sap Gui but I am not able to display them in the fiori app. I created document types with specific screen layout. But only document types with certain screen layout like NBB are available in the Manage Purchase Order app.

Is it possible to set it up?

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud private system
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,
I have been reading this course: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/extending-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-build-apps-and-key-user-extensibility/establishing-connectivity-between-sap-s-4hana-cloud-and-sap-btp_f3d6df41-c36c-450b-8ae8-79534e043fa1 . 

and many doubts arose.
The first one is: Do I have to have the Communication Systems application implemented, in order to make the connection between BTP and my S/4 HANA system?
the second doubt is: Can it be that to connect BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise I have to use Cloud Connector, but for S/4 HANA Cloud Public I don't have to use it?

Help please, I am lost with this.
Thanks and greetings to all,

entry.title: Can we set CFL fields to display only in standard fiori app ?
entry.content: Hi All, we have few custom fields added in Manage Billing Document. Is there a way we can set these field to display only when user is editing other standard field?

entry.title: Issue with sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding#create
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am refereing the SAP documentation to implement inline row creation in sap.ui.table.Table with OData V2 model, utilizing the create() method from the sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding library.

ODataListBinding#create

https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/6c47b2b39db9404582994070ec3d57a2%23loio4c4cd99af9b14e08bb72470cc7cabff4

As per document i am getting the Rows context for the table and trying to use create() method. So, the entry is visible at the table without the need to first save it to the backend and then refresh the binding  but the create() method is not defined.

********************Code Start ************************************

<!-- sap.ui.table.Table control declared in XML view -->
<Table id="ToLineItems" rows="{
events : {createActivate : '.onCreateActivateLineItem'}
path : 'ToLineItems'
}">

// controller coding

// initial creation of inline creation rows when data has been loaded
onInit : function () {
var oItemsBinding = this.getView().byId("ToLineItems").getBinding("rows");

oItemsBinding.attachEvent("dataReceived", function () {
// check that length is final before creating at end and only create inactive entry once
if (oItemsBinding.isLengthFinal() && oItemsBinding.isFirstCreateAtEnd() === undefined) {
that.onCreateActivateLineItem();
}
});
},

// event handler for createActivate
onCreateActivateLineItem : function (oEvent) {
// product id is a required property for the item => item remains inactive if it's not set
if (!oEvent.getParameter("context").getProperty("ProductID")) {
oEvent.preventDefault();
return;
}

var oItemsBinding = this.getView().byId("ToLineItems").getBinding("rows");
oItemsBinding.create({/* initial data*/}, /*bAtEnd*/ true, {inactive : true});
}

**************************Code End *************************

Could you please provide any advice or suggestions?

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Focus for search field in custom card
entry.content:
Hey Folks,

I have a small problem with the custom card. I developed a Fiori elements app and added a custom card to the analytical list page.

This custom card includes sap.m.table and two SearchFields. The problem is that the focus will not set to the search field when I click. The fields can only be activated by clicking on the magnifier glas or right click.

I also tried normal input field ... removed everything from the card except the search field. Always the same behavior. 

Hover over the searchButtons will work as expected! It seems to be a bug in the custom card.

Do you have an idea?

entry.title: How to hide table columns dynamically in Fiori Elements Analytical List Page based on Filter values?
entry.content:
Dear all,
We have one requirement in CAP application. We are using ALP Floor plan to build Fiori app.
We need to change the visibility of Table columns dynamically based on filter value from Filter bar either it is Visual filter or compact filter bar.
We have checked dynamic expressions in annotations but it is hiding only table cell value not column. 

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#dynamic-expressions .
Any help will be appreciated.


Regards,
Venkatesh.

entry.title: How to extend a standard firoi application in SAP BAS?
entry.content:
Hello folks, Im new to SAP Fiori /UI5....I have been exploring with the concept of how to extend the standard fiori application..

For starters I have disabled one button -  'Create' in the app: Manage sales order

 

Now I want to disable one of the table columns and one filterbar/value help as well..

Can anyone let me know how I can do that....?

Thanks in advance:)

entry.title: How to Trigger LDAP to EWM (TU is created in EWM)
entry.content: How to Trigger LDAP to EWM (TU is created in EWM)

entry.title: SAP CAP Deployed application UI returning Not-Found error
entry.content:
I have deployed a CAP Application with UI and Approuter. When I test the application locally the UI is visible and the service is accessible. When I deploy the app to BTP, it is not loading the welcomFile mentioned in approuter xs-app.json. It is giving 404 not found error.

Folder structure

 

 

UI xs-app.json

Approuter xs-app.json

The UI was generated automatically. No changes are done so far

 

Error

entry.title: ValueHelp Operator problem with Fior elements filter
entry.content: Hi experts, I drew a filter with fiori element in public cloud environment, some apps default to equal to when I press value Help, and some apps (page) are contains, do you know what makes the difference between the two? I was asked to set the default to contains, but I have no idea. Please help me

entry.title: Unable to access SAP BAS in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm using my trail account for SAP BTP and when I'm trying to launch SAP BAS from my trail account it says 

"Check Your Trial Account We could not open SAP Business Application Studio.
Check that your trial account has not been suspended. If needed, click the "Extend Free Trial" button in the cockpit.
I read some online blogs and added all the entitlements to my sub account. I even deleted my sub account twice and added all the entitlements but still the result is same.
Anyone please help me with this issue.

 

 
Thanks,
Karthik

entry.title: how to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our personal PC using uploadSet
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our laptop.

While uploading a file(uploadSet control has been used), I have given encodeURIComponent(filename) to show special characters. But while downloading it, the special characters are replaced with "#".

Could you please help me here in resolving this issue?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Asha

entry.title: How to pass values from List Report page to object page
entry.content: I've a requirement, where while navigating from fiori list report page to object page, need to pass one value, and then based on that value i need to display data over object page, how to achieve the same?

entry.title: UI5 Fiori Query Request / Call with Parameters (RAP) ODATA V4
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

we have created an ODATA V4 in ABAP via the RAP process, which works without any problems and a CDS data query and action call is possible.

We have also implemented a query with parameters, which is to be called with the parameters and returns a list which is sorted in the ABAP backend and the parameter "menge" is used to decide how many data records (lines) are returned.

in eclipse with "service bindings" in the preview this works exactly as desired and the abap code is processed

We have defined the query in this way:

 

@EndUserText.label: 'MM: Data Model Bestandsübersicht'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_MM_BESTAND_PGMVT_LITE'
define root custom entity ZMM_I_BESTAND_PGMVT_LITE
  with parameters
    matnr : matnr,
    werks : werks_d,
    menge : zmm_de_menge_dec
{
  key charge  : charg_d;
  key mhd     : vfdat;
      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure : 'ZMM_I_BESTAND_PGMVT_LITE.EINHEIT'
      bestand : labst;
      einheit : meins;


}

 

i have tried to work with the examples that can be found in the following link:

Parameters - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com)

With the help of this documentation, however, I have not even managed to send a request to the abap backend, it always goes to an error in the browser console.

 

How can I call the query with parameters which I pass to the backend and get back a list as seen in the eclipse preview?

Metadata:

 

 

<EntityType Name="BESTANDType">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="charge"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="mhd"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="charge" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10"/>
                <Property Name="mhd" Type="Edm.Date" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="bestand" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="13" Scale="3"/>
                <Property Name="einheit" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="Parameters" Type="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zmm_ui_pgmvt_lite.v0001.BESTANDParameters" Nullable="false"/>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="BESTANDParameters">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="matnr"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="werks"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="menge"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="matnr" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40"/>
                <Property Name="werks" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4"/>
                <Property Name="menge" Type="Edm.Decimal" Nullable="false" Precision="13" Scale="3"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="Set" Type="Collection(com.sap.gateway.srvd.zmm_ui_pgmvt_lite.v0001.BESTANDType)" Partner="Parameters" ContainsTarget="true"/>
            </EntityType>

 

many thanks in advance!

 

Best regards, 

Lukas

entry.title: Seeking Assistance with Fiori ListReport App Grid Table Multiselect Options
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently in the process of developing a Fiori ListReport application and I am aiming to have my table type set as a grid table with multiselect options. I have been creating the ListReport using the Fiori ListReport template in Web IDE, and I am working with UI5 version 1.78.9.

Here is how my manifest.json for table settings is currently configured:

"tableSettings": {
              "type": "GridTable",
              "multiSelect": true,
              "selectAll": true
            }

When I preview the application using the "npm run start" command, everything appears to be in order and nothing seems to be missing. However, when I deploy the application, the checkboxes that should allow for the selection of records are nowhere to be found. It appears as though the table settings were not deployed correctly, as I am able to enable the multiselect option via the web DevTool console using the command: sap.ui.getCore().byId(GridTableName)._getSelectionPlugin().setSelectionMode('MultiToggle').

I have also attempted to resolve this issue by adjusting the table setting to "selectionMode": "MultiToggle" and upgrading the UI5 version, but neither of these solutions have resulted in any changes.

I am hopeful that someone in this forum may have some suggestions or insights that could assist me in resolving this issue.

Best regards,

entry.title: How to display leading zeros in RAP Fiori App key field?
entry.content:
Hi, I'm implementing a RAP-based Fiori Application in S/4HANA On-Prem.

My current issue is figuring out how to display the main Key field - Document Number - with leading zeros. It is a NUMC 10 field in the database, with output length 10 in the domain.

How it currently displays:

How I would like it to display:

I have tried to create a duplicate field in the main CDS View and force the leading zeros:

key docnr                                     as Docnr,
cast(lpad(docnr,10,'0') as abap.char(10))     as DocnrLong,

However the frontend seems to always delete the leading zeros, maybe if I change something in BAS files, like formatter.js, is there a way?

Thank you

entry.title: ODataModel not getting called when adding authorization header
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a weird problem that suddently appeared. We have an fiori application where we call a OData secured by a JWT Bearer token. We added the token when creating the odata model.

 

                    const oDataModel = new ODataModel({
                        "serviceUrl": "/odata/v2",
                        "headers": {
                            "Authorization": "Bearer " + accessToken.AccessKey
                        }
                    });

 

This has worked for us up until last Monday, when it suddenly stopped working from within Business Application Studio.

In WebDeveloperTools I can see that the response is a 401, that takes much shorter time than expected from the API

I cannot see the call in the Terminal

 

info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService2>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch

 

 

If I however comment out the Authorization header in my call, or even replace the header name with anything else it behaves as expected. I get a popup asking for Basic Auth, and I can see the call in the terminal.

 

info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /odata/v2/$metadata         <-------------
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch

 

 

I don't understand what is happening, but to me it seems like either Chrome or backend-proxy-middleware suddenly filters out calls with an Authorization header.  It seems like it's working on our version deployed on a Gateway Hub, so I tend to think it's the backend-proxy-middleware that does something.

Regards
Mattias

entry.title: Bizhub 4052 print physical documents
entry.content:
Hello, 
I have added a new printer which is a Konica Minolta Bizhub 4052 which we have with several other within a secure print environment. 
So locally everybody can print with his username and PIN. 

In SAP i configured a new printer in SPAD,

with device type:  KOC650A1 : bizhub C650 Series PCL as this is one which has on Print Options Tab the "User authentication". 
I enabled it, but when going to count physical documents and try to print i can select the printers which are within the environment, i can hear the beab beab when printer receives the request but it says failed login and i see that the user name is set to "PRINT" which is not correct at all. 

I thought when choosing the printer it should open another pop up in which i can set my user credentials for Secure Print?

Can somehow shedd some light into this curious behavior, i cannot imagine that SAP has not such an option to deal with Secure Print environments????

What is also funny is that when printing another thing like a label material or handling unit i can select the printer and go into additional options but the Print option User authentification does not appear. If i flag and unflag others they are disappearing and appear like it should be the only one which is not working at all is this user authentication. 

Many many thanks.

entry.title: Unhandled Error: e.data.search is not a function
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while using the SAP Fiori MyInbox application in Web IDE Personal Edition. When I try to run or debug the application, I receive the following error message:

 

 

Unhandled Error: e.data.search is not a function

 

 

I have tried several troubleshooting steps, including:

Clearing the cache and cookies of my browser
Reinstalling Web IDE Personal Edition

Despite these efforts, the issue persists. I would greatly appreciate any insights or solutions you might have to resolve this problem. If anyone has experienced a similar issue or has any suggestions, please share your advice.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,
